ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., Accelerometer, Gyroscope) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sensor's status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "unique_identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sensor (e.g., serial number or MAC address) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the sensor */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor readings (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., Accelerometer, Gyroscope) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "elapsed_time" REAL /* Elapsed time since the start of the measurement */,
  "f1_acc_x" REAL /* X-axis acceleration value */,
  "f1_acc_y" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration value */,
  "f1_acc_z" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration value */,
  "f1_gyro_x" REAL /* X-axis gyroscope value */,
  "f1_gyro_y" REAL /* Y-axis gyroscope value */,
  "f1_gyro_z" REAL /* Z-axis gyroscope value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sensor data (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  "data_flag" TEXT /* Flags associated with the sensor data (e.g., anomaly, outlier, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor associated with the metadata */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., calibration, configuration, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_metadata_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "calibration_result_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenances" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenances_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_firmware" (
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that received the firmware update */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware */,
  "install_date" TEXT /* Date the firmware was installed */,
  "installed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who installed the firmware */,
  "firmware_update_method" TEXT /* Method used to update the firmware (e.g., OTA, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firmware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_firmware_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the sensor data (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., trend prediction, anomaly detection) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for data analysis (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor located at this location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor's location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the sensor's location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_locations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
